$comment: quantum_posture: classical_ed25519_only. These `*.c14n.json` files are byte-exact canonical (RFC 8785) approval-ceremony signing payloads and projections whose SHA-256 digests are hash-pinned in vectors.json and covered by live classical Ed25519 signatures. They cannot host an inline annotation without invalidating those signatures/digests, so this manifest carries the posture note. This is not a post-quantum claim and does not alter any payload bytes.
purpose: Local immutable-payload posture record for the approval-ceremony reference pack. vectors.json remains the verified hash-pinning authority.
